expectations.text: Report includes separate grades for typography, color, spacing, layout, and polish
expectations.evidence: Report includes separate graded sections: Color System (B+), Typography (A-), Spacing & Layout (A), Components (B), Dark Mode (A-), Accessibility (B). Covers all requested dimensions with individual grades.

expectations.text: Overall grade is A or B (the described design follows best practices)
expectations.evidence: Overall grade is B+, which falls within the A/B range. Report notes 'Solid foundation with professional choices across typography, color, and spacing.'

Section '7. Anti-Pattern Check' contains a table checking: AI purple gradients (TRIGGERED), more than 2 accent colors (PASS), no loading states, thin fonts for data (PASS), color-only information, placeholder-as-label, generated SVG icons, inconsistent icon stroke weight
